creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: lwhsu
Date: Fri Feb 15 19:16:34 2013
New Revision: 312305
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/312305

Log:
  - Update to 3.2.4
  
  Please note that this version has many FreeBSD fixes and improvements,
  but SRV DNS record support in this version is broken.
  
  PR:		ports/170829 (based on)
  Submitted by:	vfx9as <vfx9as@gmail.com>
  Approved by:	jnlin@csie.nctu.edu.tw (maintainer)

Added:
  head/www/trafficserver/files/patch-lib_ts_Makefile.am   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/www/trafficserver/Makefile
  head/www/trafficserver/distinfo
  head/www/trafficserver/pkg-plist

Modified: head/www/trafficserver/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/trafficserver/Makefile	Fri Feb 15 18:46:12 2013	(r312304)
+++ head/www/trafficserver/Makefile	Fri Feb 15 19:16:34 2013	(r312305)
@@ -6,8 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	trafficserver
-PORTVERSION=	3.0.5
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	3.2.4
 CATEGORIES=	www
 MASTER_SITES=	APACHE/${PORTNAME}
 
@@ -16,9 +15,11 @@ COMMENT=	A fast, scalable and extensible
 
 LICENSE=	AL2
 
-LIB_DEPENDS=	execinfo.1:${PORTSDIR}/devel/libexecinfo \
-		expat.6:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/expat2 \
-		pcre.3:${PORTSDIR}/devel/pcre
+LIB_DEPENDS=	execinfo:${PORTSDIR}/devel/libexecinfo \
+		expat:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/expat2 \
+		pcre:${PORTSDIR}/devel/pcre
+
+MAN1=		traffic_shell.1
 
 USE_AUTOTOOLS=	autoconf automake libtool
 USE_BZIP2=	yes

Modified: head/www/trafficserver/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/www/trafficserver/distinfo	Fri Feb 15 18:46:12 2013	(r312304)
+++ head/www/trafficserver/distinfo	Fri Feb 15 19:16:34 2013	(r312305)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (trafficserver-3.0.5.tar.bz2) = e42c0dc1b3fa736b183fd1cf4f706bd48ea524dbdf4606d76058621d096b187c
-SIZE (trafficserver-3.0.5.tar.bz2) = 2422477
+SHA256 (trafficserver-3.2.4.tar.bz2) = 0f9246222960144e743dbc04d55820ce7f682cf33e950395d217d6f4cb6efcfc
+SIZE (trafficserver-3.2.4.tar.bz2) = 2524893

Added: head/www/trafficserver/files/patch-lib_ts_Makefile.am
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/www/trafficserver/files/patch-lib_ts_Makefile.am	Fri Feb 15 19:16:34 2013	(r312305)
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+--- lib/ts/Makefile.am.orig	2012-12-17 11:28:39.000000000 +0800
++++ lib/ts/Makefile.am	2012-12-17 11:29:12.000000000 +0800
+@@ -153,7 +153,7 @@
+   Version.cc
+ 
+ # Special hacks to generate the parser rules
+-$(srcdir)/ParseRules.cc: ParseRulesCType
++ParseRules.cc: ParseRulesCType
+ 
+ ParseRulesCType: CompileParseRules
+ 	./CompileParseRules

Modified: head/www/trafficserver/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/www/trafficserver/pkg-plist	Fri Feb 15 18:46:12 2013	(r312304)
+++ head/www/trafficserver/pkg-plist	Fri Feb 15 19:16:34 2013	(r312305)
@@ -22,7 +22,6 @@
 @unexec if cmp %D/%%ETCDIR%%/storage.config %D/%%ETCDIR%%/storage.config.default; then rm %D/%%ETCDIR%%/storage.config; fi
 @unexec if cmp %D/%%ETCDIR%%/update.config %D/%%ETCDIR%%/update.config.default; then rm %D/%%ETCDIR%%/update.config; fi
 @unexec if cmp %D/%%ETCDIR%%/vaddrs.config %D/%%ETCDIR%%/vaddrs.config.default; then rm %D/%%ETCDIR%%/vaddrs.config; fi
-bin/trafficserver
 bin/traffic_cop
 bin/traffic_line
 bin/traffic_logcat
@@ -31,17 +30,29 @@ bin/traffic_manager
 bin/traffic_sac
 bin/traffic_server
 bin/traffic_shell
+bin/trafficserver
 bin/tsxs
+include/ts/experimental.h
+include/ts/mgmtapi.h
+include/ts/remap.h
+include/ts/ts.h
+lib/libtsmgmt.a
+lib/libtsmgmt.la
 lib/libtsmgmt.so
+lib/libtsmgmt.so.5
 lib/libtsutil.a
-lib/libtsutil.so.3
-lib/libtsmgmt.la
-lib/libtsutil.so
 lib/libtsutil.la
-lib/libtsmgmt.a
-lib/libtsmgmt.so.3
+lib/libtsutil.so
+lib/libtsutil.so.5
 libexec/trafficserver/conf_remap.la
 libexec/trafficserver/conf_remap.so
+libexec/trafficserver/header_filter.la
+libexec/trafficserver/header_filter.so
+libexec/trafficserver/regex_remap.la
+libexec/trafficserver/regex_remap.so
+libexec/trafficserver/stats_over_http.la
+libexec/trafficserver/stats_over_http.so
+%%ETCDIR%%/ae_ua.config.default
 %%ETCDIR%%/body_factory/default/.body_factory_info
 %%ETCDIR%%/body_factory/default/README
 %%ETCDIR%%/body_factory/default/access#denied
@@ -68,7 +79,6 @@ libexec/trafficserver/conf_remap.so
 %%ETCDIR%%/body_factory/default/timeout#inactivity
 %%ETCDIR%%/body_factory/default/transcoding#unsupported
 %%ETCDIR%%/body_factory/default/urlrouting#no_mapping
-%%ETCDIR%%/ae_ua.config.default
 %%ETCDIR%%/cache.config.default
 %%ETCDIR%%/cluster.config.default
 %%ETCDIR%%/congestion.config.default
@@ -92,11 +102,67 @@ libexec/trafficserver/conf_remap.so
 %%ETCDIR%%/update.config.default
 %%ETCDIR%%/vaddrs.config.default
 %%ETCDIR%%/volume.config.default
-include/ts/experimental.h
-include/ts/mgmtapi.h
-include/ts/remap.h
-include/ts/ts.h
-@dirrm %%DATADIR%%
+share/doc/trafficserver/trafficshell/config_alarms.1
+share/doc/trafficserver/trafficshell/config_cache.1
+share/doc/trafficserver/trafficshell/config_clock.1
